_comment: Source of truth for the CURRENT AIRBDS assessment-skill release on each channel. The assessment skill fetches this at runtime to tell a user when a newer skill — one that assesses against a newer AIRBDS metric version — is available for THEIR OWN channel. A skill compares only against its own channel: a 'testing' skill is never nudged because 'development' has moved ahead. Update this file whenever a channel's released skill starts targeting a new metric version (see skills/README.md).
